@graph.name: TONYTONY | W Ventures — Website Relaunch Case Study for a Venture Capital Firm
@graph.description: Complete digital overhaul for W Ventures, a Berlin-based VC firm. Custom dark-theme UI, GSAP scroll animations, and fully CMS-driven architecture by TONYTONY.

@graph.name: W Ventures — Complete Digital Overhaul
@graph.description: Complete digital overhaul for W Ventures, a Berlin-based VC firm with a portfolio including Corgi, Klaviyo, Harmattan AI, Numeral, and SmithRx. Custom dark-theme UI with GSAP scroll animations, fully CMS-driven architecture, and SEO-ready structure.
@graph.text: Context: W Ventures is a Berlin-based venture capital firm with a portfolio of high-profile names — Corgi, Klaviyo, Harmattan AI, Numeral and SmithRx to name a few. Their existing website had fallen behind — visually dated, structurally rigid, and no longer matching the stature of the companies they back. They needed a complete digital overhaul that would stand credibly alongside the caliber of their investments. Challenge: Unlike a typical VC site built around text and logos, W Ventures needed a design that balances authority with approachability — serious enough for institutional credibility, dynamic enough to attract founders. The UX/UI had to communicate trust and vision simultaneously, while a CMS-driven backend was essential to let the team independently update portfolio companies, news, and team content as the firm scales. Solution: I led both the UX/UI design and full Webflow development, crafting an interface that pairs clean editorial layouts with purposeful motion. GSAP-powered scroll animations and a custom dark-theme experience give the site a distinctive presence, while the entire content layer — portfolio companies, team bios, news — runs on Webflow's CMS for complete editorial autonomy. Semantic heading structure and performance optimization ensure strong technical SEO foundations throughout. Outcome: A bold, redesigned digital identity that positions W Ventures as a credible, modern European VC; Custom dark-theme UI with scroll-driven GSAP animations reinforcing the firm's forward-looking brand; Fully CMS-driven architecture — portfolio companies, team, and news all editable without developer support; UX/UI designed and developed end-to-end by TONYTONY, from wireframes through to production; SEO-ready structure with clean document hierarchy and structured data groundwork for future growth.
